free_text: Investigation of photonuclear reactions on isotopes
V-51, natCu, natMo, 115In and 207Pb at photon energy
Eg-max = 20 - 70 MeV.
The linear electron accelerator LUE-75
at the National Laboratory of Armenia named after
Alikhanyan (AANL), Yerevan, Armenia.
Bremsstrahlung with end-point energies 20, 30,
40 and 70 MeV.
The target were round metal foils.
The vanadium target was pressed from powder of
vanadium oxide (V2O5).
High sensitive HPGe detectors.
After measuring the gamma spectra the yields of the
radioactive nuclei formed in the targets per
equivalent quantum using the formula (1) of the
article.
The flux-weighted average cross sections obtained
using formula (2) of the article are presented.
M0920006 contains evaluated cross section of
65Cu[(g,n)+(g,np)] reaction, not 365Cu(g,n)
experimental one.
The experimental results are an integral value
expressed as a convolution of two functions:
the cross section and the photon distribution
function.
The experimental data are represented as a
flux-weighted average cross section.
Data were compiled at the Russia MSU SINP
CDFE by V.Varlamov.
Corrected by VV and SD: STATUS.
The flux-weighted average reaction cross sections.
